notes: v0.6.4 — Hohome brand identity + texture-tint composition note. (1) Tray reskinned with hohomehk.com colours: dark-teal #1a4548 surfaces, cream #fdd79a buttons + active tabs, warm cream text on teal. White logo (300×281 from white-logo.png) shown top-left with the brand tagline 為你屋企添意思 · 訂造傢俬搵好傢俬. Plugin renamed from 'GPT Render' to 'Hohome AI Render' in the tray title. Logo file ships inside the .rbz (build-rbz.sh now bundles brand_logo.png alongside the source). (2) Preamble taught Gemini that SU material entries can be a TEXTURE × HEX-tint composition: if the table's HEX clearly differs from the swatch's average tone, apply the HEX as a multiply-blend tint over the texture pattern. Catches the common case where a designer overrides a texture's HSL or opacity in Edit-Material — previously the AI would render the raw texture without the override, mismatching what the designer actually sees in SU.
